paragraphs.text: 环境问题是当今世界面临的最大挑战之一。随着工业的发展和人口的增长，地球上的资源正在被过度消耗，空气和水污染越来越严重。
paragraphs.translation: Environmental issues are among the biggest challenges facing the world today. With industrial development and population growth, resources are being over-consumed.

paragraphs.text: 每个人都可以为保护环境贡献力量。我们可以从日常生活中的小事做起：减少使用一次性塑料制品，做好垃圾分类，节约用水用电。
paragraphs.translation: Everyone can contribute to environmental protection. We can start with small things in daily life: reduce disposable plastics, sort garbage, save water and electricity.

paragraphs.text: 中国在环保方面也做出了很多努力，大力发展清洁能源，推广电动汽车。绿水青山就是金山银山，我们每个人都应该珍惜地球家园。
paragraphs.translation: China has also made great efforts in environmental protection, developing clean energy and promoting electric vehicles. Clear waters and green mountains are as valuable as gold and silver.
